newQuiz.stem: The heavy rain prevented the rescue team ___ reaching the village ___ time, so the supplies arrived a day late.
newQuiz.explanation: prevent sb from V-ing(阻止某人做某事)用 from;in time 表『及時、來得及』;supplies 遲到一天正是『沒能及時』的結果。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ in time(及時、趕得上)≠ on time(準時、按表定時間);此處強調『來不及』故用 in time;prevent 後固定接 from + V-ing,不可換 of。

newQuiz.stem: He was accused ___ stealing the money, but ___ the end the real thief turned out to be the manager ___ charge of the safe.
newQuiz.explanation: be accused of(被指控)用 of;in the end(最後、終究)是固定片語;be in charge of(負責、掌管)用 in。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ in the end(最終、結果)≠ at the end of(在…末端);accuse of 不可換 for(blame sb for 才用 for);in charge of 三字一組記。

newQuiz.stem: ___ behalf of the whole class, I'd like to thank you ___ everything you've done for us ___ the past three years.
newQuiz.explanation: on behalf of(代表)用 on;thank sb for sth 用 for;over the past three years(在過去三年間)表一段延續期間用 over。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ on behalf of 固定用 on,非 in/for;表『過去這幾年間』與 the past...years 搭配 over 最自然;since 須接時間點,接時段不可用。

newQuiz.stem: ___ spite of the bad weather, the marathon went on, and runners kept going ___ the finish line ___ exhaustion.
newQuiz.explanation: in spite of(儘管)用 in;跑『朝向』終點線用 toward;第三空『不顧筋疲力盡』後接名詞 exhaustion,用 despite。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ in spite of 與 despite 同義但結構不同:in spite OF(三字含 of)vs despite(本身即介系詞,後不加 of);第三空後接名詞 exhaustion 須用 despite,不可再用 in spite。

newQuiz.stem: The new bridge is ___ construction now; ___ its completion, drivers must take the old road ___ the river.
newQuiz.explanation: under construction(施工中)為固定片語;until its completion(直到完工為止)表持續用 until;沿著河(平行於河岸)走老路用 along。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ under construction 固定用 under,非 in/on;until(持續到某時點)強調『在完工前一直』,by(期限)語意不符;沿著河岸用 along,across 是橫越過河。

newQuiz.stem: This phone is far superior ___ that one ___ terms of battery life, though it costs ___ a hundred dollars more.
newQuiz.explanation: be superior to(優於)用 to,非 than;in terms of(就…而言)固定片語;『多出一百多美元』表超過某數量用 over。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ superior/inferior/prior/senior 等拉丁比較字後一律用 to,絕不用 than;in terms of 整組記;over a hundred(超過一百)用 over,above 多指高度位置。

newQuiz.stem: We all agreed ___ the plan, but couldn't agree ___ who should lead it, so we agreed ___ the manager to decide.
newQuiz.explanation: agree to + 提案/計畫(同意接受)用 to;agree on + 議題(對某點達成共識)用 on;agree with + 人(同意某人)用 with。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ agree 三種搭配考點:agree TO a plan(接受方案)、agree ON a point(就某議題取得共識)、agree WITH a person(贊同某人);依受詞性質分辨,最易混。

newQuiz.stem: Instead ___ taking the bus, she decided to go ___ foot, which turned out to be faster ___ rush hour.
newQuiz.explanation: instead of(而非)用 of;on foot(步行)固定片語;during rush hour(在尖峰時段)用 during + 名詞。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ instead of 後接名詞/動名詞用 of;『步行』是 on foot 而非 by foot(交通工具才用 by);during 後接名詞(rush hour),若接子句才用 while。

newQuiz.stem: The flight was delayed ___ three hours ___ to the storm, and passengers had to wait ___ the gate ___ midnight.
newQuiz.explanation: delayed by three hours(延誤達三小時,表幅度)用 by;due to(由於)固定片語;在登機門(視為一點)用 at the gate;『等到午夜』表持續用 until。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ delay BY three hours(延誤的『時間量』用 by)易誤填 for;due to 須與 to 搭配(因 to the storm);wait at the gate(把門當點);until midnight(一直等到)不用 by(by 是期限不含『持續等待』語意)。

newQuiz.stem: Regardless ___ the cost, they insisted ___ buying the best equipment, hoping it would pay ___ ___ the long run.
newQuiz.explanation: regardless of(不論、無視)用 of;insist on V-ing(堅持)用 on;pay off(獲得回報、值得)為片語動詞;in the long run(長遠來看)固定片語。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ regardless of 固定用 of;insist on 不可換 in;pay off=(投資/努力)有回報,別填 pay back(償還);in the long run(長期而言)用 in,非 at。

newQuiz.stem: The library stays open ___ the clock during exams, so students can study there ___ any hour ___ the night.
newQuiz.explanation: around the clock(全天候、24 小時)固定片語;at any hour(在任何鐘點)用 at;at any hour of the night(夜裡任何時刻)用 of 修飾。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ around the clock=日夜不停,別照字面填 over/about;鐘點/時刻用 at any hour;『夜裡的』用 of the night(of 表所屬),不用 in the night 直接接。

newQuiz.stem: Apart ___ being expensive, the hotel was ___ walking distance ___ the beach, which made it popular ___ tourists.
newQuiz.explanation: apart from(除…之外)用 from;within walking distance of(在步行可達範圍內)固定搭配,distance OF the beach 用 of;be popular with(受…歡迎)用 with。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ within walking distance OF(距離某地用 of)易誤填 to/from;be popular WITH sb(受某群人歡迎)用 with,不用 for/among;apart from 與 except for 義近但介系詞不同。

newQuiz.stem: The boss objected ___ the proposal and was opposed ___ any change, so the team had to give ___ the idea ___ a while.
newQuiz.explanation: object to(反對)用 to;be opposed to(反對)用 to;give up(放棄)片語動詞;『放棄一陣子』表持續一段時間用 for a while。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ object TO 與 be opposed TO 都用 to(不可用 against,雖中文都是『反對』);give up=放棄;for a while(一段時間)用 for,不可用 since。

newQuiz.stem: The temperature here stays ___ zero all winter, and snow lies ___ the ground ___ months ___ a time.
newQuiz.explanation: below zero(零度以下)用 below;snow on the ground(雪覆蓋地面)用 on;for months(持續數月)用 for;for months at a time(一次連續數月)用 at a time。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ below zero(刻度/數值之下)用 below 而非 under;雪在地『面』上用 on the ground;for...at a time(一次連續…之久)是固定結構,別用 in/since。

newQuiz.stem: ___ addition to English, she speaks French, and ___ means of an online app she is now learning Japanese ___ her own.
newQuiz.explanation: in addition to(除…之外還)用 in;by means of(藉由…手段)固定片語用 by;on one's own(獨自、靠自己)固定片語用 on。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ in addition to(此外還有,語氣為附加)用 in;by means of(透過某方法)整組記,不可用 with means;on one's own=獨力,用 on 不用 by。

newQuiz.stem: The witness swore that ___ no circumstances had he seen the suspect, who was ___ doubt somewhere else ___ the time of the crime.
newQuiz.explanation: under no circumstances(在任何情況下都不)固定片語;without doubt(無疑地)用 without;at the time of(在…的時刻)用 at。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ under no circumstances 固定用 under(且為倒裝句 had he seen);without doubt(無疑)用 without;at the time of 用 at,不用 on/in。

newQuiz.stem: He is senior ___ me ___ rank, but ___ comparison ___ his predecessor, he is far less experienced.
newQuiz.explanation: be senior to(資歷/地位高於)用 to;in rank(在職級上)用 in;in comparison with(與…相比)固定片語用 with。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ senior to 同 superior to,後用 to 不用 than;in comparison WITH(與…比較)用 with;別把 senior 當一般形容詞接 than。

newQuiz.stem: The factory was shut down ___ safety reasons, throwing hundreds ___ work, which led ___ protests ___ the streets.
newQuiz.explanation: for safety reasons(基於安全考量)用 for;out of work(失業)固定片語;lead to(導致)用 to;protests in the streets(在街上抗議)用 in。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ for...reasons(基於…原因)用 for;out of work=失業(out of 表脫離狀態),別填 off;lead to(導致)用 to 不可省;『在街上』用 in the streets。

newQuiz.stem: Thanks ___ everyone's effort, the project was finished ahead ___ schedule and well ___ budget, much ___ the boss's delight.
newQuiz.explanation: thanks to(多虧、由於)用 to;ahead of schedule(提前)用 of;within budget(在預算內)用 within;much to one's delight(令某人非常高興的是)固定句型用 to。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ thanks to(歸功於/由於)用 to,非 for;ahead OF schedule 用 of;within budget(預算之內)用 within;『much to one's + 情緒名詞』是固定句型,用 to。

newQuiz.stem: The two countries finally came ___ an agreement ___ years of talks, putting ___ end ___ the long conflict.
newQuiz.explanation: come to an agreement(達成協議)用 to;after years of talks(歷經數年談判後)用 after;put an end to(結束、終止)固定片語,end 後用 to。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ come TO an agreement(達成)用 to,易誤 into;put an end TO sth(終結某事)固定用 to,不可用 of;after(在…之後)表歷時數年後,別填 since。

newQuiz.stem: The scientist devoted her whole life ___ research, and ___ her dedication we now benefit ___ many of her discoveries.
newQuiz.explanation: devote...to(致力於、奉獻給)用 to;thanks to(多虧)用 to;benefit from(從…受益)用 from。
newQuiz.trap: ⚠ devote...to + V-ing/名詞(奉獻於)用 to,易誤填 for;『多虧她的奉獻』用 thanks to(後接名詞);benefit FROM(受益於某來源)用 from,不用 of。
